item.name: Floral Snakehead
item.description:
A giant tropical wavekin sporting a fascinating pattern.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: This fish boasts unique scale patterns that resemble─and shine unnervingly in the dark like─a thousand eyes, though its name indicates that this is subject to interpretation on the part of the beholder. Growing up to a few yalms in size, it can be found swimming languidly through the Font of Maya.
